Package com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components

Class Execution

java.lang.Object
com.apexfintechsolutions.ascendsdk.models.components.Execution
public class Execution extends Object
Execution - An execution represents a partial-fill or a fill that is part of an order. Executions are children to a Trade, which collectively represents an entire order made by a client.

    hashCode()

    Caller provided but can be used for booking-service to note original trade details when booking into the error account or using the error asset.

    • Execution

      public Execution(org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ExecutionAccruedInterestAmount> accruedInterestAmount, Optional<String> activityId, Optional<? extends List<BondYield>> bondYield, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends CommissionAmount> commissionAmount, Optional<String> executionId, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> executionTime, Optional<String> externalId, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends GrossAmount> grossAmount, Optional<String> memo, Optional<String> name, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ExecutionPrevailingMarketPrice> prevailingMarketPrice, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ExecutionPrice> price, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends PriceAdjustment> priceAdjustment, org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<? extends ExecutionQuantity> quantity, Optional<? extends ExecutionState> state, Optional<String> streetExecutionId, Optional<String> tradeId)

    • Execution

      public Execution()

  • Method Details

    • accruedInterestAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ExecutionAccruedInterestAmount> accruedInterestAmount()
      The amount of interest that has been accrued in the issuing currency for a single instrument. Requirement of 15 or less integral number and 2 or less fractional precision. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • activityId

      public Optional<String> activityId()
      The id of the activity in the Ledger that represents this trade.

    • bondYield

      public Optional<List<BondYield>> bondYield()
      The yield associated with an individual fill of a fixed income trade. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades. Not allowed for trades of other instrument types.

    • commissionAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<CommissionAmount> commissionAmount()
      Commission amount of the execution. Requirement of 11 or less integral number and 2 or less fractional precision.

    • executionId

      public Optional<String> executionId()
      A ULID that uniquely identifies the execution.

    • executionTime

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<OffsetDateTime> executionTime()
      Timestamp of when the execution took place. If settlement_date is not provided, this field will be converted into Eastern Time and used to calculate settlement_date.

    • externalId

      public Optional<String> externalId()
      Used to generate execution_id, should be unique on the day for each source_application caller.

    • grossAmount

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<GrossAmount> grossAmount()
      Gross amount is calculated by the Booking service by multiplying price and quantity and fixing it to 2 fractional precision. Requirement of 11 or less integral number and 2 or less fractional precision. Optionally specifiable. If present, will override the gross_amount calculated above.

    • memo

      public Optional<String> memo()
      Caller provided but can be used for booking-service to note original trade details when booking into the error account or using the error asset.

    • name

      public Optional<String> name()
      The resource name of the execution.

    • prevailingMarketPrice

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ExecutionPrevailingMarketPrice> prevailingMarketPrice()
      The price for the instrument that is prevailing in the market. Requirement of 8 or less integral number and 8 or less fractional precision. Required for FIXED_INCOME trades when the broker_capacity is PRINCIPAL.

    • price

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ExecutionPrice> price()
      Price with requirement of 8 or less integral number and 8 or less fractional precision.

    • priceAdjustment

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<PriceAdjustment> priceAdjustment()
      Price adjustment that will be applied to the net price of the security.

    • quantity

      public org.openapitools.jackson.nullable.JsonNullable<ExecutionQuantity> quantity()
      Quantity with requirement of 12 or less integral number and 5 or less fractional precision.

    • state

      public Optional<ExecutionState> state()
      The state that the trade is in.

    • streetExecutionId

      public Optional<String> streetExecutionId()
      Street-level execution id, unique by day per execution venue.

    • tradeId

      public Optional<String> tradeId()
      The unique identifier of the trade this execution belongs to.

    • builder

      public static final Execution.Builder builder()
